K2 & Mwala Crushing Elephant Charge 2014

25 October 2014 · 📍 Kawanga

15 Entries
7 Completed
47% Finish rate
$65,677 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Edmund Farmer — For his immense contribution to the charge and especially the safety of the teams by providing a rescue helicopter
